hero.sub: Gienah is a software studio that turns ambitious ideas into projects people love — from strategy and design to engineering and growth.

paragraphs: Since 2020, Gienah has partnered with startups and enterprises to design, build and grow digital products across education, mobility, energy, real estate and beyond. We work as one team across strategy, design, engineering and growth — so nothing gets lost in the handoff.
From AI-powered platforms serving millions to focused internal tools, we sweat the details that make software feel effortless.
stats: Reached through learning, mobility and product ecosystems
Shipped from strategy and design to engineering and growth
Spanning edtech, mobility, energy, real estate and internal tools
LLMs, automation and ML workflows built into practical products
